welcome.title: Welcome to eIsland
welcome.desc:
A Windows desktop floating widget inspired by Apple Dynamic Island,
making your desktop more vivid and productive.

basic.title: Basic Interaction
basic.desc: Use your mouse to interact with Dynamic Island and unlock different states.

music.title: Music & Lyrics
music.desc: Automatically detects playing music and shows synced lyrics in real time.

tools.title: Useful Tools
tools.desc: A variety of practical features are integrated in the expanded panel.

settings.title: Personalization
settings.desc: Customize your Dynamic Island experience in settings.

auth.title: Account Service
auth.desc: Log in or register now to enable cross-device sync and account management.
auth.tipSync: After login, your profile can be synced.
auth.tipMode: You can use the Plugin Market and Wallpaper Market features.

scroll.title: Basic Interaction
scroll.desc: Scroll the mouse wheel over Dynamic Island to switch states.

hover.title: Hover to Expand
hover.desc: Hover over Dynamic Island to expand the preview panel.

click.title: Click Action
click.desc: Click Dynamic Island to open the full control panel.

retract.title: Auto Retract
retract.desc: Move cursor away from Dynamic Island to retract to idle state.

smtc.title: SMTC Auto Detection
smtc.desc: Automatically identifies active music source and syncs playback info.

lyrics.title: Lyrics Matching & Sync
lyrics.desc: Auto-matches multi-source lyrics and scrolls current lines in real time.

karaoke.title: Karaoke Sweep Mode
karaoke.desc: Supports word-by-word highlight karaoke lyric display.

todo.title: Todo
todo.desc: Manage your todo list in the expanded panel.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.desc: Built-in AI chat for instant smart answers and suggestions.

timer.title: Countdown & Timer
timer.desc: Set countdowns or events and track important moments precisely.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Focus
pomodoro.desc: Stay productive with Pomodoro focus sessions.

theme.title: Theme Switch
theme.desc: Freely switch between dark, light, and system theme.

opacity.title: Opacity Adjustment
opacity.desc: Customize the background opacity of Dynamic Island.

position.title: Position Fine-tune
position.desc: Adjust horizontal and vertical offset at screen top.

autostart.title: Auto Start
autostart.desc: Set whether Dynamic Island starts automatically with system.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.desc: Control Dynamic Island quickly with global shortcuts.

hints.basicWheel: Scroll in this area to switch Dynamic Island states
hints.musicWheel: Scroll to view more music features
hints.toolsWheel: Scroll to view more practical tools

music.karaokeSample: This is a sample lyric line

sampleLyrics.0: This is a sample lyric line
sampleLyrics.1: Music is floating in the air

onboarding.title: Todo
onboarding.desc: Manage your tasks here and stay organized.
onboarding.feature1: Create todos and set priority and size
onboarding.feature2: Click to expand details and add descriptions
onboarding.feature3: Break down subtasks and track progress
onboarding.hint: Add your first todo in the input above ↑

countdown.newTitlePlaceholder: < Select a date to add event
countdown.empty: Select a date and add an event

update.readyBody: Version v{{version}} has been downloaded. Install now?

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro
pomodoro.workFinished: Focus session finished, take a break

onboarding.title: Music Overview
onboarding.desc: Once music starts, real-time info appears here
onboarding.feature1: Cover disc, live lyrics, and waveform animation
onboarding.feature2: Time, weather, and countdown at a glance

messages.missingApiKeyWarn: ⚠️ Please fill in API Key in Settings → AI Config first.
messages.emptyWithoutApiKey: Please fill in API Key in Settings → AI Config first

urlFavoritesTab.title: URL Favorites
urlFavoritesTab.empty: No favorites yet, add a URL first.

input.placeholderWithItems: Type and add a new URL favorite

clipboardHistoryTab.title: Clipboard History
clipboardHistoryTab.empty: No records yet. Copy some text and it will appear here.

empty.title: No media yet
empty.desc: Drag images/videos here, or click "Add Media"

status.allDuplicated: Media file already exists, skipped duplicates
status.openInExplorerFailed: Cannot locate {{name}}. The file may have been moved or deleted.
status.saveAsFailed: Failed to save {{name}}. Please try again.
status.setIslandBackgroundFailed: Failed to set island background. Please try again.

sliderCaptcha.title: Slider Verification
sliderCaptcha.subtitle: Challenge service powered by Pyisland Server & eIsland
sliderCaptcha.hint: Solve the equation below first, then drag the slider to the matching value

localFileSearch.title: Local File Search
localFileSearch.empty: No results yet. Try another keyword or folder.
localFileSearch.rootPlaceholder: Choose or enter a root folder, e.g. C:\Users

index.title: Quick Navigation
index.hintEdit: Drag cards to reorder, then click Done to save.
index.hintView: Click a card to jump to its settings page.

language.title: Display Language
language.hint: Changes apply immediately to localized UI text

configChanged.title: Configuration Changed
configChanged.body: Todo/Countdown/Settings open mode changed. Restart now to apply?

windowControlsChanged.body: Standalone window controls style changed. Restart now to apply?

layout.previewHint: Live preview of the Expand-state island with the chosen widgets. Picking below updates instantly.
layout.widgetPickerHint: Pick the widget for each side. Changes apply and persist instantly.

hideProcess.title: Hidden Window Management
hideProcess.hint: When blacklisted process windows are focused, Dynamic Island hides automatically.
hideProcess.runningHint: Click a row to add/remove from the blacklist. Search by process name is supported.

position.title: Dynamic Island Offset
position.quickAdjustHint: Each click moves the island by 10px; applied and saved instantly.
position.displayHint: Choose which monitor shows Dynamic Island in multi-display setups. Takes effect after restart.
position.preciseHint: Enter horizontal / vertical offset (px). Press Enter or click Apply to commit.

theme.title: Theme Mode
theme.windowControlsHint: When enabled, the top-right controls in standalone window use macOS-style traffic-light dots (takes effect after restart)
theme.builtinWallpaperHint: Choose a built-in image as island background
theme.customImageHint: Select local image: jpg / png / gif / webp
theme.customVideoHint: Select a local video. Only mp4 is supported.
theme.videoVolumeHint: Background video volume (0 - 100%). Requires unmute to take effect.
theme.videoHwDecodeToggle: Enable hardware decoding (takes effect after restart)
theme.bgCardSubtitle: Pick a built-in wallpaper, or import a local image / video as the island background
theme.effectCardSubtitle: Tune the background opacity and blur
theme.videoCardSubtitle: Fit mode, audio and playback control for the background video

behavior.springHint: Disable to reduce bounce and make transitions smoother
behavior.mouseLeaveHint: Collapse when cursor leaves island area (Restart required)
behavior.expandLeaveToggle: Collapse from Expand state on mouse leave
behavior.maxExpandLeaveToggle: Collapse from MaxExpand state on mouse leave
behavior.windowModeHint: Choose embedded in island or standalone window

urlParser.title: Clipboard URL Monitor
urlParser.hint: Show prompt when URL is detected in clipboard
urlParser.detectModesHint: Choose what is treated as a URL, and optionally silence prompts while the favorites view is open.
urlParser.suppressInFavorites: Do not notify in favorites view
urlParser.blacklistHint: Blocked domains are filtered from notifications

autostart.toolsHint: Common app actions and log tools
autostart.title: Auto Start
autostart.hint: Configure startup behavior on system login

status.highPriority: Starts with higher priority for faster load.

enabled.title: History Recording
enabled.hint: When disabled, no new clipboard records are added, while existing records are kept.

limit.title: Max Records
limit.hint: New records are stored using this rolling limit.

exitMaxExpandOnCopy.title: Auto Exit After Copy
exitMaxExpandOnCopy.hint: Automatically exits max expand after copying a history item; returns to lyrics view when music is playing, otherwise to idle.
exitMaxExpandOnCopy.toggle: Enable exit max expand after copy

actions.title: Data Management
actions.hint: You can clear all saved clipboard history at once.

timeout.title: Request Timeout
timeout.hint: Set the maximum wait time for network requests
timeout.customHint: Enter between 1 - 120 seconds; applies on Enter or blur.

staticAssetNode.title: Static Asset Node
staticAssetNode.hint: All users default to R2, and PRO users can choose R2/COS/OSS.
staticAssetNode.proHint: Upgrade to PRO to switch COS/OSS nodes (or keep using R2).

locationPriority.title: Location Priority
locationPriority.hint: Prefer IP-based auto location or custom location

weather.customCityHint: Only used when 'Custom Location First' is active. Test before saving; Chinese / Pinyin / English are supported.

providerPriority.title: Weather Provider Priority
providerPriority.hint: Prefer Open-Meteo, UAPI, or QWeather (PRO), then auto-fallback

alert.title: Startup Weather Alert Prompt
alert.hint: Before startup auto update check, request QWeather alerts first. Update check continues after you confirm close.

messages.cityRequired: Please enter a city name before testing
messages.proLoginRequired: Please sign in with a PRO account first
messages.customNeedsCity: Please enter a city name before choosing 'Custom Location First'
messages.customMissingFallback: Switched to Custom Location First, but no city is configured; falling back to IP location

adcode.missingParams: District API is missing query params (adcode or keyword)
adcode.nonJson: Adcode API returned non-JSON content, please check your network
adcode.notFound: No matching city found, try a more complete name

whitelist.title: Player Whitelist
whitelist.hint: Only whitelisted players can trigger music metadata
whitelist.addHint: Enter a player process name manually, or detect it from the current SMTC session

lyrics.title: Lyrics Source
lyrics.hint: Auto mode selects source by detected SMTC player and falls back to LRCLIB
lyrics.displayHint: Control how lyrics are rendered on screen
lyrics.clockHint: Show current Beijing time between cover and lyrics

smtc.title: SMTC Auto Unsubscribe
smtc.hint: Clean stale sessions with no updates for long periods

toggleIsland.title: Show/Hide Island Shortcut
toggleIsland.hint: Click Edit and press keys (e.g. Alt+X, Ctrl+Shift+H)

resetPosition.title: Reset Position Shortcut
resetPosition.hint: Press to reset island to top-center default position

toggleTray.title: Show/Hide Tray Icon Shortcut
toggleTray.hint: Press to toggle the tray icon visibility

showConfig.title: Show Settings Window Shortcut
showConfig.hint: Only works in standalone mode: press to open the standalone settings window and switch to the Settings page

openClipboardHistory.title: Open Clipboard History Shortcut
openClipboardHistory.hint: Press to open Dynamic Island and jump directly to Clipboard History

togglePassthrough.title: Toggle Mouse Passthrough Shortcut
togglePassthrough.hint: Press to lock or unlock mouse passthrough; when locked, Dynamic Island will not intercept mouse events

toggleUiLock.title: Toggle UI State Lock Shortcut
toggleUiLock.hint: Press to lock the current UI state. While locked, mouse enter/leave or auto logic will not change state. Press again to unlock

screenshot.title: Area Screenshot Shortcut
screenshot.hint: Press to start area screenshot flow

update.versionCardHint: View the current version and pick an update source. All patches are downloaded through the selected source.
update.actionCardHint: Trigger a manual check; when a new version is available you can download it. After the download finishes, click 'Install & Restart' to apply.
update.sourceHint:
Cloudflare R2: stable global access with balanced overall speed
Tencent COS: usually faster in mainland China
Aliyun OSS: broad domestic node coverage with high peak throughput
GitHub Releases: stable overseas links, may be slower in mainland China
update.proOnlyError: This update source is available to PRO users only
update.proOnlyNeedLogin: Please sign in with a PRO account before using this source
update.sourceResolveFailed: Failed to resolve update source URL

auth.entryTitle: Sign in to access plugin market content
auth.hint: Sign in to browse wallpapers and plugins.

tag.placeholder: Type a tag then press Enter or comma

feedback.emptyMine: You haven't uploaded any wallpapers yet
feedback.selectHint: Select a wallpaper from the left to view metadata

rating.help: Click a star to rate. 5 stars means you love it.

upload.transcodeRemux: Already a compatible codec, remuxing in fast path…
upload.transcodeCopy: ffmpeg not detected; copying the source file directly…
upload.copyright: I confirm I own the copyright or have authorization
upload.copyrightInfoPlaceholder: Copyright declaration details (e.g. original work, authorization source, license number)

feedback.selectHint: Select a wallpaper from the left list
feedback.videoTypeInvalid: Only mp4 video files are supported

ai.credentialsHint: OpenAI-compatible protocol. Fill in your API Key, Endpoint and model name.
ai.mcpHint: Optional. Once an MCP endpoint is configured, the Agent can call external tools through it.
ai.systemPromptHint: Constrains the Agent's role and style. Leave empty to use the default prompt.

about.notice: This software is open-source and free. If you paid for it anywhere, request a refund immediately.

wallpaper.notice: NASA images are used under NASA image policy and do not imply NASA endorsement.

feedback.intro: Issue reports are reviewed in the admin panel. Please include complete reproduction details when possible.

fields.contactPlaceholder: Email, QQ, or any reachable contact
fields.title: Title
fields.contentPlaceholder: Provide reproduction steps, actual result, and expected result
fields.logFilePlaceholder: Upload logs to help diagnose the issue

messages.loginRequired: Please sign in before using issue feedback
messages.captchaCancelled: Complete slider verification before submitting feedback
messages.boundEmailNotFound: No bound email found for the current account
messages.boundEmailFilled: Current account email has been auto-filled

history.title: My Feedback History
history.loginHint: Sign in to view your submitted feedback history

auth.hint: Sign in and registration are powered by eIsland server
auth.entryTitle: Sign in to manage avatar, profile, and account security settings

fields.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 chars with letters and digits
fields.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep; at least 8 chars with letters and digits

sections.profileHint: Complete public profile details for easier account recognition
sections.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep your current password

infoNav.editDesc: Edit gender, birthday, and other profile details
infoNav.avatarDesc: Upload or change your account avatar
infoNav.passwordDesc: Change login password via email verification
infoNav.proDesc: View Free and Pro plan benefits plus current subscription pricing
infoNav.ordersDesc: Check order status, continue payment, or close pending orders
infoNav.logoutDesc: Sign out or delete your account

orders.title: My Orders
orders.subtitle: View your account orders and continue payment or close pending ones

feedback.closeFailed: Failed to close order. Please try again later

pro.title: Plans
pro.subtitle: Choose Free or Pro based on your usage needs

free.name: Free
free.desc: Essential features for light daily usage.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Full advanced capabilities with ongoing updates.

payment.title: Buy Pro
payment.subtitle: Select a payment method and continue on the website. Your Pro benefits will sync to this account after payment succeeds.

payment.fallbackHint: If scanning is unavailable, click the button below to open the web checkout page.

danger.hint: Deleting your account removes associated data immediately and cannot be undone. Proceed with care.
